title: The Serums
summary: M-21, Immortal, anti-viral, 'Incredible Hulk' — the named energetic serums injected by voice, across ten sessions and any distance.
markdown:
**The Serums** are the archive's signature healing practice: named, injectable preparations
delivered not by needle but by **spoken command** — through the
[Device](/lore/source-coil-device/), through [Baramay](/lore/baramay/), and, the sessions
insist, through the broadcast itself. *"We can transmit serum by television, through the
distance,"* Kosol explains in the April 23, 2020 interview — and the transcripts show him
doing exactly that, dosing not just the room but everyone watching: *"antibiotic serum — and
antiviral — into all the YouTube fans that are watching this channel, and the Facebook
people… and also some Super-Soldier serum, anti-stress serum… and Incredible Hulk serum:
please inject these into them: now!"*

The pharmacopoeia is long and exuberant. Across ten sessions the record names **anti-viral
and antibiotic serums**, **immune-boost**, **Clarity serum**, **anti-stress**,
**Super-Soldier and super-strength serums**, the **Incredible Hulk serum**, **Super Medical
Nanite serum**, **Superprotein**, **internal-youth and Immortal serums**, and — by the 2023
sessions — the designation **M-21**. Alongside the exotic sits the homely: ginger, lemongrass,
turmeric, bitter melon, and elderberry, "injected" by the same command discipline.

The practice sits at the junction of the archive's teachings: the
[manifestation protocol](/lore/manifestation/) supplies the "serum from heaven," the
[MedBed](/lore/medbed/) is its far-future hardware, and the [Upgrade](/lore/the-upgrade/) is
what the serums are said to serve — the body being readied, dose by spoken dose, for what the
record says is coming. Preserved as practiced, for the reader to weigh.
